description: The Leg Haptic Point Mapper works as part of the game's robust Haptics system to map haptics points in real life for the leg to the in game legs.

fields.Priority: The priority of this over other haptic elements
fields.ShowDebugVisuals: Enables a sphere visual that lights up when touching haptic zones.
fields.BoneChain: The list of slots to distribute the haptic points along for the leg.
fields.NormalizedStart: The start of where haptics points should be placed based on a normalized position from 01 along the length of the leg, if all the bones were rotated to be along a straight line.
fields.NormalizedEnd: The end of where haptics points should be placed based on a normalized position from 01 along the length of the leg, if all the bones were rotated to be along a straight line.
fields.Side: Specifies which controller/hand this component gives haptic data to.
fields.UpAxis: The axis on the leg which determines which way is up per bone, which is used to map haptic points from real life to in game.
fields.ForwardAxis: The axis on the leg which determines which way is forward per bone, which is used to map haptic points from real life to in game.
fields.UpperLegRadius: The radius of the upper leg, where haptics points should be placed on the surface, radii is lerped between the upper leg and knee.
fields.KneeRadius: The radius of the knee, where haptics points should be placed on the surface, radii is lerped between the upper leg and knee.
fields.AnkleRadius: The radius of the upper leg, where haptics points should be placed on the surface, radii is lerped between the knee and ankle.

usage: Used in the robust Haptics system to map haptics points in real life for the leg to the in game legs.
